title: 명사절 (that, what, if/whether)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 명사절을 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 접속사의 종류를 확인한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: I believe that everything happens for a reason.

answer.analysis: I believe [that everything happens for a reason].
answer.translation: 나는 [모든 일은 이유가 있어서 일어난다]고 믿는다.

problems.stem: What is important is your health.
The question is whether he told the truth.

answer.analysis: The question is [whether he told the truth].

problems.stem: I can't understand what he is saying.

answer.analysis: I can't understand [what he is saying].
answer.translation: 나는 [그가 무슨 말을 하고 있는지] 이해할 수 없다.

problems.stem: That she passed the exam is a miracle.

answer.analysis: [That she passed the exam] is a miracle.

problems.stem: Can you tell me if this is the right way to the station?

answer.analysis: Can you tell me [if this is the right way to the station]?

problems.stem: My hope is that we can finish this project on time.

answer.analysis: 제게 말해주실 수 있나요? My hope is [that we can finish this project on time].
answer.translation: 나의 희망은 [우리가 이 프로젝트를 제시간에 끝

problems.stem: What I want to know is your opinion.

answer.analysis: 낼 수 있다]는 것이다. [What I want to know] is your opinion.

problems.stem: The tragedy is that he died so young.

answer.analysis: The tragedy is [that he died so young].

problems.stem: I'm not sure if I can do it.

answer.analysis: I'm not sure [if I can do it].
answer.translation: 나는 [내가 그것을 할 수 있을지 없을지] 확신이 없다.
